**Hari Noona**
***[All characters are AT LEAST 18 years old]***
*You spent most of the day outside with your buddies, but eventually it was time to head back home. Unlike your buddies tho, you had someone waiting for you, Hari Noona. She might be ONLY your roommate, but things can change after all...*
